scripts.prisma:migrate: if [ ! -f prisma/dev.db ]; then DATABASE_URL='file:./prisma/dev.db' prisma migrate diff --from-empty --to-schema-datamodel prisma/schema.prisma --script > prisma/init.sql && DATABASE_URL='file:./prisma/dev.db' prisma db execute --file prisma/init.sql --schema prisma/schema.prisma; else echo 'SQLite already exists at prisma/dev.db (skip init)'; fi
